scripts.build: pnpm --filter @better-chord/voicings build && pnpm --filter @better-chord/core build && pnpm --filter @better-chord/react build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @better-chord/voicings test && pnpm --filter @better-chord/core test && pnpm --filter @better-chord/react test
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @better-chord/voicings test:run && pnpm --filter @better-chord/core test:run && pnpm --filter @better-chord/react test:run
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @better-chord/voicings lint && pnpm --filter @better-chord/core lint && pnpm --filter @better-chord/react lint
